text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking along the riverbank...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Excuse me, do you have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Could I ask you to time my run? It's hard for me
to do it on my own...
choice_data_list: Sure! Now run as fast as you can!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. I appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I help Silence Suzuka train, I'm completely
blown away by her incredible speed.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
As fast as I can? Okay. I'll do my best, so please
be sure to get my time.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff! Huff! Hehe! This feels amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka races past me at an astounding
speed... then disappears into the distance.
